title: zehneria martinez-crovettoi
intro: Zehneria martinez-crovettoi, also known as Calea, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico, used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Zehneria martinez-crovettoi include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
